summary: Russian operators of the "Rubikon" FPV drone unit reported 136 enemy targets eliminated on March 14, 2026, across multiple sectors including Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman. Ukrainian forces struck the Afipsky oil refinery in Krasnodar Krai, causing a major fire confirmed by NASA FIRMS satellite monitoring. The SIGNUM battalion destroyed a Russian tank camouflaged with netting using an FPV drone, while Russian forces countered with the "Yolka" anti-drone system, which has been effective against Ukrainian fixed-wing "Hornet" UAVs. In riverine operations, Russian FPV drones destroyed enemy unmanned boats near Tendrovskaya Spit and the Dnieper delta. Ukrainian FPV tactics included simultaneous strikes on Russian infantry, targeting dismounted soldiers and even a soldier who charged with a bayonet. Russian forces also reported intercepting Ukrainian FPV drones using electronic warfare systems and deploying FPVs against enemy drones and boats.
